name: Cyon Exploration Ltd.
summary: Cyon Exploration Ltd. explores for and develops mineral properties in Canada. It holds interest in the Black Rock Canyon gold property that covers an area of approximately 3,894 acres located in Cortez Trend. The company was formerly known as True Grit Resources Ltd. and changed its name to Cyon Exploration Ltd. in September 2020. Cyon Exploration Ltd. is based in Vancouver, Canada.
